name: Output Filtering
description: Validate and filter model outputs before they are returned to users or passed to downstream systems.
implementation_guidance: Check responses for sensitive information, protected prompt content, and unsafe downstream instructions.
Use deterministic validators for structured outputs before rendering, execution, or storage.
Redact or block responses that exceed the user's authorization context.
verification_methods: Evaluate responses with sensitive-data and system-prompt disclosure rules.
Confirm downstream consumers reject invalid or unsafe model output.
Test benign responses to measure overblocking and business impact.
